title: Heart-shaped Box, heart, size 11,5x11,5 cm, H: 6 cm, 1pc
features: Unique Design: Heart-shaped with a charming rustic style, perfect for adding a touch of romance to your space
Generous Size: Measuring approximately 11.5cm in diameter and 5cm in height, it offers ample storage space
Durable Material: Crafted from lightweight yet sturdy paper mache, ensuring longevity and portability
Versatile Use: Ideal for arts and crafts, gift wrapping, or as a decorative storage box for trinkets and treasures
Easy Access: Equipped with a convenient flip-top lid and a single compartment for quick and simple access to your stored items
description: Craft a charming storage solution with our Heart Box, a handmade paper mache storage box in a heart shape, measuring approximately 11.5cm in diameter and 5cm in height. This lightweight, portable box features a flip-top opening mechanism, a single compartment, and is perfect for arts and crafts, or as a decorative accent. Personalize it with wrapping paper, craft sheets, mosaics, stickers, paint, or any creative touch you desire. Not water-resistant.
